% ── SUMMARY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Summary}

Data Analyst with 2+ years at ADP --- built BigQuery data models for financial reporting and payroll analytics, partnered with Finance and FP\&A to surface cost-saving insights (\textasciitilde{}8--10\% cost optimization), and designed Looker/Tableau dashboards used daily by 40+ stakeholders.
      Strong in SQL (CTEs, window functions), Python automation, and translating business questions into actionable data; also applied OpenAI-powered NLP to automate processing of 100K+ daily feedback records (85\% accuracy); independently shipped Job Tailor (jobtailor.in) end-to-end.

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{Data Analyst}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Built and maintained scalable BigQuery data models supporting financial reporting, payroll analytics, and cost monitoring across 5+ reporting domains; standardized fact and dimension schemas, improving reporting consistency by \textasciitilde{}20\%.
  \item Partnered with Finance and FP\&A stakeholders to analyze cost structures, workforce spending, and budget trends; delivered ad-hoc analyses covering cost trend analysis, attrition impact on expenses, and budget variance --- contributing to \textasciitilde{}8--10\% cost optimization over two quarters.
  \item Developed complex SQL queries using CTEs and window functions to analyze large transactional datasets including payroll flows, employee costs, and revenue-linked metrics; designed PostgreSQL schemas with strategic indexing that cut dashboard query load times for 40+ daily users.
  \item Designed and deployed Looker and Tableau dashboards tracking financial KPIs --- payroll expenses, cost per employee, and operational efficiency --- enabling self-service analytics and data-driven decisions for 40+ stakeholders across Finance, Product, and Ops.
  \item Automated recurring financial and operational reporting workflows using Python (pandas, scheduled pipelines); reduced manual reporting effort by \textasciitilde{}40\% and eliminated human error from weekly executive reports.
  \item Architected Customer Feedback Intelligence System ingesting 80K--100K records daily from support tickets, app reviews, and chatbot logs; applied OpenAI-powered NLP classification achieving 85\% accuracy and cutting manual tagging effort by 50\%+.
  \item Surfaced payment failures as the top driver of negative sentiment through cohort analysis; insight directly informed Q3 product prioritization and led to targeted fixes that reduced payment-related complaints by 20\%.
  \item Ensured data accuracy across financial and operational reporting by implementing validation checks and maintaining a single source of truth; collaborated cross-functionally to translate business questions into structured data requirements and actionable insights.
\end{itemize}

% ── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Projects}

\entry{Job Tailor}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder}{github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://jobtailor.in/}{jobtailor.in}}{2025 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Shipped data-driven job search platform ingesting real-time listings from Naukri, Indeed India, Internshala, and Adzuna/RemoteOK; applies AI match-scoring with score breakdown, supporting sort, filter, pin, and bulk actions.
  \item Designed PostgreSQL (Supabase) schema for multi-source job data with Prisma v5 ORM; implemented keyword gap analysis pipeline comparing candidate profiles to JD requirements.
  \item Built full-stack on Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, NextAuth.js; deployed on Vercel with CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Keen --- AI Due Diligence Platform}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/keen}{github.com/lohith261/keen} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://keen-sigma.vercel.app/}{keen-sigma.vercel.app}}{2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected multi-agent due diligence automation platform for PE firms --- research agents integrate Salesforce, NetSuite, SEC EDGAR, HubSpot, and Crunchbase; TinyFish browser automation accesses locked platforms (Bloomberg, LinkedIn, SAP) with real-time pipeline monitoring and pause/resume without progress loss.
  \item Engineered Claude AI analysis layer that cross-references aggregated business data to surface revenue mismatches, audit red flags, and risk discrepancies; exports reports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: React/TypeScript (Vercel) + Python 3.11 (Fly.io) + Supabase + Redis.
\end{itemize}
